banner.message: Install Wallet360 and take your finances with you — free.

install.iosStep1: Tap the Share icon (the square with an arrow) in Safari's toolbar.
install.iosStep2: Choose "Add to Home Screen" and confirm.
install.sectionSubtitle: No app store needed — install straight from your browser in seconds and keep your finances in your pocket.

footer.tagline: Your finances, from every angle. Credit, investments and budgeting in one place.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.intro: Questions, suggestions, or found a bug in a simulator? Write to us.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Message sent — thank you! We'll reply by email.
contact.error: Couldn't send the message. Please try again.

hero.title: Your finances, made clear.
hero.subtitle: Free Portuguese credit, Euribor, IRS and investing simulators.

tools.sectionSubtitle: No sign-up, no credit card. All calculations run in your browser.

irs.name: IRS — Capital gains
irs.oneLiner: Import your Trading 212 statement and see your Anexo J in seconds.

credito.name: Mortgage simulator
credito.oneLiner: Simulate your monthly payment, rate and total cost.

compare.name: Pay down or invest
compare.oneLiner: Find out whether paying down your mortgage or investing pays off more.

euribor.name: Euribor revision
euribor.oneLiner: Calculate how much your payment will rise (or fall) at the next revision.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.body: Your files are read in your browser — they never leave your computer.

portugal.title: Built for Portugal
portugal.body: Euribor, TAN, Anexo J — the simulators speak the language of Portuguese tax rules.

free.title: Free to start
free.body: Use the simulators without creating an account. Sign up whenever you want to save your data.

pricing.title: Free vs Pro

free.title: Free
free.item2: An account with credit, investments and budgeting

pricing.note: The Wallet360 app has no ads — Pro is about extra features, not removing advertising.

toolsIndex.metaDescription: Free, no-signup simulators: IRS capital gains, mortgage, pay-down-or-invest, and Euribor revision. Built for Portugal.
toolsIndex.title: Free simulators
toolsIndex.intro: Four free tools, no sign-up, with the calculations running in your browser. Pick one to get started.

irs.metaTitle: IRS simulator — Trading 212 capital gains (Anexo J) — Wallet360
irs.metaDescription: Import your Trading 212 statement and calculate FIFO realized capital gains, free and with no sign-up. Preview of the first 5 rows of your Anexo J.
irs.uploadHint: Settings → History → Export → CSV. You can upload several files (one per year).
irs.dropCta: Drag a file here or click to choose one
irs.privacyNote: The file never leaves your computer.
irs.errNotT212: We couldn't recognise this file as a Trading 212 statement. Make sure you exported it via Settings → History → Export → CSV.
irs.errNoSales: No sales found in this file — only buys generate positions, not capital gains.
irs.incompleteWarning_one: {{count}} row with an acquisition that predates the imported data — the acquisition value is incomplete.
irs.incompleteWarning_other: {{count}} rows with an acquisition that predates the imported data — the acquisition values are incomplete.
irs.gateTitle: Create a free account or install the app to see the full report, with Anexo J export.
irs.disclaimer: This is not tax advice. Values follow the legally required FIFO method and the 28 % flat rate (opting for aggregation may be more advantageous in some cases). Always confirm with an accountant or on the Portal das Finanças.

credito.metaTitle: Mortgage simulator — payment, rate and interest — Wallet360
credito.metaDescription: Simulate your monthly mortgage payment, rate and total interest. Free, unlimited and no sign-up.
credito.ctaSave: Save this loan in the app
credito.errInvalid: Check the values — all of them must be positive.
credito.prefillSaved: Values saved in this browser for the "Pay down or invest" simulator.

compare.metaTitle: Pay down your mortgage or invest? Free simulator — Wallet360
compare.metaDescription: Compare paying down your mortgage against investing the same amount. Free simulator, no sign-up.
compare.needCreditFirst: First fill in your loan details (or use the mortgage simulator).
compare.prefilledNote: Values pre-filled from the mortgage simulator.
compare.chartTitle: Outstanding balance — with and without paying down
compare.ctaSave: Simulate your loan in the app

euribor.metaTitle: Euribor revision simulator — new payment — Wallet360
euribor.metaDescription: Calculate how much your mortgage payment will rise or fall at the next Euribor revision. Free and no sign-up.
euribor.errFetch: Couldn't fetch the current Euribor. Please try again.

meta.title: Wallet360 — Free Portuguese credit, Euribor and IRS simulators
meta.description: Free Portuguese mortgage, Euribor, IRS capital-gains and pay-down-or-invest simulators. No sign-up required.
